title: V3Dfg.h: non-packed has no 'width()'
body:
Hi there!

I found this error when building some SystemVerilog with Verilator

```
%Error: Internal Error: ../src/internalerror_0.1/src/pickled.sv:69815:24: ../V3Dfg.h:381: non-packed has no 'width()'
69815 |    logic [width_p-1:0] mem [els_p-1:0];
      |                        ^~~
%Error: Internal Error: Aborting since under --debug
Aborted
```

## Can you attach an example that shows the issue?  (Must be openly licensed, ideally in test_regress format.)
[I created a repo for you to reproduce the issue.](https://github.com/flaviens/verilator_internal_err_undriven)

## What 'verilator --version' are you using?  Did you try it with the git master version?
```
Verilator 5.001 devel rev v4.228-166-gcb7b024e8
```

## What OS and distribution are you using?
Ubuntu 22.04

Thanks!
code_blocks:
%Error: Internal Error: ../src/internalerror_0.1/src/pickled.sv:69815:24: ../V3Dfg.h:381: non-packed has no 'width()'
69815 |    logic [width_p-1:0] mem [els_p-1:0];
      |                        ^~~
%Error: Internal Error: Aborting since under --debug
Aborted
